visual: Shoulder-width parallel stance with both arms crossing in front of the chest, wrists stacked, palms facing inward.
motion_description: From a wide stance with arms extended laterally, the person steps the right foot inward to form a shoulder-width parallel stance while maintaining a forward-facing torso. In a continuous, steady flow, the person lowers into a squat while sweeping both arms downward in wide arcs to cross in front of the lower abdomen, right wrist over left, with palms facing inward. The body then rises steadily from the squat as the crossed arms are lifted to chest height. Finally, the arms uncross and the hands open to face slightly outward as the posture settles.
